request_error_message: Queued job superseded before execution: image172647_c01 had already failed in-run pODMR TrackCenter/count gate and immediate standalone retrack, project state moved to fresh re-image candidate reimage1804_c01, and a separate reimage1804_c01 pODMR is currently running. Preventing unintended stale c01 execute from an interrupted old single-submit batch.
decision_reason: The request targets the obsolete image172647_c01 strong-pi pODMR batch. That branch failed before useful pODMR data because in-run TrackCenter/count gates and immediate retrack were low-count; project recovery moved to fresh re-image candidates, accepted reimage1804_c02 by terminal strong-pi pODMR, and is now waiting on the c02 Ramsey/T2star scout. Retrying stale c01 would be obsolete and bridge-unsafe while another project-owned execute is running.
single_submit_control_stop_reason: superseded stale image172647_c01 single-submit after low-count failures and fresh reimage1804_c01 pODMR running; do not retry old c01

running_status.message: (3/8) averages completed for 1 scans Autosave is enabled. Once the first average is saved, the in-progress savedexperiment MAT file can be raw-exported with claw_export_savedexperiment_mat_raw to inspect raw readouts before execute completes.

allowed_scope_observed: Only the named project recovery artifact/note and the requested recovery plan were written; no bridge queue jobs or other project directories were mutated.
